title: Perspectives for self-driving labs in synthetic biology
summary_en: A biology-specific perspective on how self-driving laboratories could reshape synthetic-biology design–build–test–learn cycles.
summary_zh: 从合成生物学视角讨论自驱动实验室如何重塑 Design–Build–Test–Learn 闭环。

title: Autonomous ‘self-driving’ laboratories: a review of technology and policy implications
summary_en: A recent review that separates self-driving-lab technologies from their governance, policy, and societal implications.
summary_zh: 系统梳理自驱动实验室技术，并将工程能力与治理、政策和社会影响区分开来。

title: Robot Scientist Adam / The Automation of Science
summary_en: A landmark robot scientist that generated and tested functional-genomics hypotheses in yeast.
summary_zh: 机器人科学家早期里程碑，可在酵母功能基因组学中提出并检验假设。
category_zh: 端到端自主生物学系统

title: BacterAI
summary_en: An automated platform that turns microbial-metabolism questions into robot-executed experiments and iteratively learns interpretable rules.
summary_zh: 将微生物代谢问题转化为机器人实验，并通过迭代学习得到可解释规则的自动化平台。
category_zh: 端到端自主生物学系统

title: Generalized AI-powered autonomous enzyme engineering platform
summary_en: A generalized autonomous enzyme-engineering workflow linking AI-guided design, worklist generation, robotic execution, assays, and iterative learning.
summary_zh: 连接 AI 设计、工作列表生成、机器人执行、检测与迭代学习的通用自主酶工程流程。
category_zh: 端到端自主生物学系统

title: LUMI-lab
summary_en: A foundation-model-driven autonomous laboratory for iterative discovery of ionizable lipids for mRNA delivery.
summary_zh: 面向 mRNA 递送用可离子化脂质迭代发现的基础模型驱动自主实验室。
category_zh: 端到端自主生物学系统

title: BioDiscoveryAgent
summary_en: A tool-using LLM agent for proposing, executing computational analyses, and refining biological discovery workflows.
summary_zh: 可调用工具来提出、执行计算分析并迭代生物学发现流程的 LLM Agent。

title: Robin
summary_en: A multi-agent system that automates literature research, hypothesis generation, and computational analysis across a scientific-discovery campaign.
summary_zh: 在完整发现任务中自动完成文献研究、假设生成与计算分析的多智能体系统。

title: Biomni
summary_en: A general-purpose biomedical agent environment that plans analyses and calls a broad collection of biological tools and databases.
summary_zh: 可规划分析并调用大量生物工具与数据库的通用生物医学 Agent 环境。

title: LaMBO
summary_en: A latent-space Bayesian-optimization method for multi-objective biological sequence design.
summary_zh: 用于多目标生物序列设计的潜空间贝叶斯优化方法。

title: BRADSHAW
summary_en: A closed-loop Bayesian optimization framework for designing informative experiments under small-data constraints.
summary_zh: 面向小数据条件下信息增益实验选择的闭环贝叶斯优化框架。

title: GEARS
summary_en: A graph-based model for predicting transcriptional responses to unseen genetic perturbations.
summary_zh: 用于预测未见遗传扰动转录响应的图模型。

title: Compositional Perturbation Autoencoder (CPA)
summary_en: A compositional model for predicting single-cell responses to unseen combinations of perturbations, doses, and covariates.
summary_zh: 预测细胞对未见扰动组合、剂量与协变量响应的组合式单细胞模型。

title: EVOLVEpro
summary_en: A protein-engineering framework that combines sequence models with iterative experimental feedback to prioritize variants.
summary_zh: 结合序列模型与多轮实验反馈来优选变体的蛋白工程框架。

title: Low-N protein engineering
summary_en: A practical small-data machine-learning workflow for prioritizing protein variants with limited measurements.
summary_zh: 在测量数据有限时优选蛋白变体的实用小数据机器学习流程。

title: Machine-learning-assisted directed protein evolution (MLDE)
summary_en: A machine-learning-guided strategy for selecting compact, informative variant libraries for directed evolution.
summary_zh: 以机器学习指导构建紧凑且高信息量变体库的定向进化策略。

title: Robot Scientist Eve
summary_en: A robot scientist that automated phenotypic screening and identified candidate compounds for neglected-disease drug discovery.
summary_zh: 自动开展表型筛选并为被忽视疾病发现候选化合物的机器人科学家。

title: Quadratic Phenotypic Optimization Platform (QPOP)
summary_en: A phenotype-driven platform for efficiently searching and optimizing multidrug combinations.
summary_zh: 以表型数据驱动高效搜索和优化多药组合的平台。

title: NSF iBioFoundry (iBioFAB)
summary_en: A highly automated synthetic-biology biofoundry that provides infrastructure for design–build–test–learn workflows.
summary_zh: 为合成生物学 Design–Build–Test–Learn 提供高自动化基础设施的生物铸造厂。
category_zh: 合成生物学与生物铸造厂

title: Autoprotocol
summary_en: A machine-readable protocol specification and software ecosystem for describing executable laboratory procedures.
summary_zh: 用于描述可执行实验步骤的机器可读协议规范与软件生态。

title: LabOP
summary_en: An ontology-based language for representing, exchanging, and compiling laboratory protocols across execution environments.
summary_zh: 用于跨执行环境表示、交换和编译实验协议的本体语言。

title: Aquarium
summary_en: A laboratory operating system for planning, executing, tracking, and reproducing complex biological workflows.
summary_zh: 用于规划、执行、追踪和复现实验室复杂生物工作流的 LabOS。

title: HELAO
summary_en: A modular orchestration framework for coordinating instrument servers and automated laboratory experiments.
summary_zh: 用于协调仪器服务与自动化实验的模块化实验室编排框架。

title: MADSci
summary_en: A modular framework for scheduling workflows and coordinating devices, resources, and data in autonomous laboratories.
summary_zh: 在自主实验室中调度工作流并协调设备、资源和数据的模块化框架。

title: PyLabRobot
summary_en: A hardware-agnostic Python framework for controlling liquid handlers and other laboratory devices.
summary_zh: 面向移液工作站及其他实验设备的硬件无关 Python 控制框架。

title: SiLA 2
summary_en: A standard and software base for interoperable communication with laboratory instruments.
summary_zh: 用于实验仪器互操作通信的标准与软件基础。

title: CellProfiler
summary_en: A widely used open platform for reproducible, high-throughput quantitative analysis of biological images.
summary_zh: 广泛使用的开源生物图像高通量定量分析平台，强调可复现流程。

title: Automated Recommendation Tool (ART)
summary_en: A Bayesian ensemble framework that learns from biological experiments and recommends new designs under uncertainty.
summary_zh: 从生物实验中学习并在不确定性下推荐新设计的贝叶斯集成框架。

title: Active Learning-assisted Directed Evolution (ALDE)
summary_en: An iterative active-learning workflow that updates sequence–fitness models across rounds of directed-evolution experiments.
summary_zh: 在多轮定向进化实验中持续更新序列—适应度模型的主动学习流程。

title: ISA-Tab and ISA tools
summary_en: A standards and tooling ecosystem for structuring investigation, study, assay, and provenance metadata in life science.
summary_zh: 用于组织生命科学 Investigation、Study、Assay 与溯源元数据的标准和工具生态。

title: Vivarium
summary_en: A framework for composing heterogeneous biological models into multiscale simulations.
summary_zh: 将异构生物模型组合为多尺度仿真的框架。

title: BioSimulators
summary_en: A registry and standardized execution ecosystem for reproducible simulation of biological models.
summary_zh: 支持生物模型可复现仿真的注册表与标准化执行生态。

title: LABBench2
summary_en: A benchmark suite for evaluating AI systems on nearly 1,900 biology-research tasks across reasoning and laboratory-relevant skills.
summary_zh: 在近 1,900 个生物研究任务上评测 AI 推理与实验相关技能的基准套件。

title: Virtual Cell Challenge
summary_en: A community challenge and dataset ecosystem for evaluating models that predict cellular responses to perturbations.
summary_zh: 用于评测细胞扰动响应预测模型的社区挑战与数据生态。

title: ProteinGym
summary_en: A large evaluation suite for protein-sequence models using experimentally measured fitness landscapes.
summary_zh: 利用实验测得适应度景观评测蛋白序列模型的大型基准套件。

title: BacterAI autonomous-experiment dataset
summary_en: Published data from BacterAI’s iterative microbial-metabolism experiments, suitable for studying active-learning trajectories.
summary_zh: BacterAI 多轮微生物代谢实验的公开数据，可用于研究主动学习轨迹。

title: LUMI-lab iterative LNP design data
summary_en: Data and mapping tables from iterative ionizable-lipid design and testing in LUMI-lab.
summary_zh: LUMI-lab 可离子化脂质迭代设计与测试产生的数据和映射表。

title: ToolUniverse
summary_en: A large scientific tool ecosystem that exposes more than a thousand research resources for agentic workflows.
summary_zh: 为 Agent 工作流提供一千余种科研资源接口的大型科学工具生态。
category_zh: Agent 技能、MCP 与工具适配器

title: BioMCP
summary_en: An MCP and command-line interface that gives agents structured access to trusted biomedical sources.
summary_zh: 让 Agent 以结构化方式访问可信生物医学来源的 MCP 与命令行接口。
category_zh: Agent 技能、MCP 与工具适配器

title: Chi.Bio
summary_en: An open-source, networked bioreactor platform for automated continuous-culture experiments.
summary_zh: 用于自动化连续培养实验的开源联网生物反应器平台。

title: OpenFlexure Microscope
summary_en: An open, motorized microscope platform that can serve as an imaging and measurement endpoint in automated biology workflows.
summary_zh: 可作为自动化生物流程成像与测量终端的开放式电动显微镜平台。

title: Opentrons OT-2
summary_en: A programmable liquid-handling robot with official hardware files and an open software stack used across biological automation.
summary_zh: 广泛用于生物自动化的可编程移液机器人，公开官方硬件文件和软件栈。

title: Emerald Cloud Lab
summary_en: A commercial remote laboratory where users specify and run experiments through a cloud software interface.
summary_zh: 用户可通过云端软件定义并运行实验的商业远程实验室。

title: Culture Biosciences
summary_en: A commercial cloud-connected bioreactor platform for remote bioprocess development and data collection.
summary_zh: 用于远程生物工艺开发与数据采集的商业云连接生物反应器平台。

title: Arctoris Ulysses
summary_en: A commercial robotic drug-discovery laboratory platform centered on its Ulysses automation stack.
summary_zh: 以 Ulysses 自动化栈为核心的商业机器人药物发现实验室平台。

title: Global Biofoundries Alliance
summary_en: An international alliance connecting biofoundries and promoting shared capabilities, standards, and collaboration.
summary_zh: 连接全球生物铸造厂并推动能力共享、标准与合作的国际联盟。

title: Lab Automation Forums
summary_en: A practitioner community for laboratory automation, integration, troubleshooting, and shared implementation knowledge.
summary_zh: 面向实验室自动化、系统集成、故障排查与实践知识共享的从业者社区。
